variables.summaryLine: Best month since launch — here's what moved the needle.

metrics.label: Revenue attributed
metrics.note: New creative pack drove the lift

wins: Launched 3 new UGC creatives — 2 became top spenders
Cut cost-per-purchase by 18% with audience refresh
Retention flow lifted repeat purchase rate to 24%
variables.nextSteps: July focus: scale the 3 winning creatives and launch the retargeting pool.
